rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume "label": expression;, guarantee "label": expression;, eq name : type = expression;, const name : type = value;, and assign output = expression;
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports or constants
Use visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees, avoiding subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
generic_rules: Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in declarations
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions; expose them as ports or constants if needed
Align helper declaration types with the expression types they represent
Use if-then-else expressions for conditional logic in AGREE
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written as annex agree {** ... **};
Component type annexes contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes contain implementation-level bindings like assignments
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE type mismatch between assumed and actual types
